description_long: This is a rectangular sheet cake with a vibrant, themed edible image on top, bordered by a thick, piped orange icing. The sides of the cake are covered in blue icing with orange and yellow decorative streaks, giving it a festive and dynamic appearance. The cake sits on a flat, rectangular tray with a yellow base and partial cardboard sides, likely for transport and display. The top image features characters and the text 'Gods of Glory,' suggesting a fantasy or gaming theme. The cake appears to be a single layer, with no visible candles or additional tiers. The overall presentation is colorful and eye-catching, suitable for a celebratory event.
description: A rectangular, single-layer sheet cake with a themed edible image, orange piped icing, and blue sides with orange-yellow streaks, displayed on a tray.
description_view_0: The cake's long side is visible, showing the detailed blue icing with orange and yellow streaks and the full themed edible image on top.
description_view_1: The short end of the cake is shown, highlighting the orange piped border and the partial view of the edible image and tray sides.
description_view_2: The opposite long side is visible, again showing the blue icing with decorative streaks and a clear view of the cake's rectangular shape.
description_view_3: The other short end is shown, with the orange piped border and a partial view of the themed image and tray.
